theme: Behind the scenes — What it takes to produce a 200-person summit

linkedin.text:
What guests see: A flawless 3-day summit in Amsterdam.

What they don't see:

→ 6 months of planning
→ 47 vendor negotiations across 3 countries
→ 3 site inspections before choosing the venue
→ 2,400 dietary preferences tracked individually
→ A backup plan for every backup plan
→ A team that hasn't slept since Tuesday

Behind every "wow, this was amazing" is a production team that sweated every detail so you didn't have to.

That's what we do at Uproduction Events.

We don't just plan events. We produce experiences.
And we make it look effortless — because that's the whole point.

📩 alon@upe.co.il | 🌐 upe.co.il

#BehindTheScenes #EventProduction #CorporateEvents #Amsterdam #EventPlanning #UproductionEvents #MICE #EventProfs

facebook.text:
Ever wonder what goes into producing a 200-person corporate summit?

Here's a peek behind the curtain:

⏱️ 6 months of planning
🤝 47 vendor negotiations across 3 countries
🔍 3 site inspections before choosing THE venue
🍽️ 2,400 individual dietary preferences tracked
📋 Backup plans for every scenario

Guests see: "Wow, this was incredible."
We see: 6 months of work paying off in 3 perfect days.

That's what production means. Not just planning — perfecting.

Ready for your "wow" moment? Message us or visit upe.co.il 💬
